qualifications.name: BEd Foundation Phase Education
notes: Aggregate note: Excluding Life Orientation.
Career opportunities: Teacher for Grades R to 3; Language practitioner, editor or proofreader after further language-related study.
Admission score type: Aggregated average.
Faculty aggregate note: Excluding Life Orientation.

General admission and selection: Aggregated_Average_Required: 60%; aggregate_note: Excluding Life Orientation; requirements: ["Mathematics: 40% OR Mathematical Literacy: 60%"]; language_requirements: [{"learner_language_background": "Learners who were taught in English", "requirements": ["English Home Language: 60%", "Afrikaans OR isiXhosa, Home Language or First Additional Language: 50%"]}, {"learner_language_background": "Learners who were taught in Afrikaans", "requirements": ["Afrikaans Home Language: 60%", "English OR isiXhosa, Home Language or First Additional Language: 50%"]}, {"learner_language_background": "Learners who were taught in isiXhosa", "requirements": ["IsiXhosa Home Language: 60%", "English OR Afrikaans, Home Language or First Additional Language: 50%"]}].
Additional Stellenbosch requirements: Must meet the applicable language requirements based on language of teaching background.

qualifications.name: BEd Intermediate Phase Education
notes: Aggregate note: Excluding Life Orientation.

Career opportunities: Primary school teacher for Grades 4 to 7; Teacher with competence in two intermediate school subjects and two languages; Language practitioner, editor or proofreader after further language-related study.
Notes: Choose one or preferably two subjects as teaching modules; All teaching modules are not available every year; A minimum number of students per teaching module is required.
Admission score type: Aggregated average.
Faculty aggregate note: Excluding Life Orientation.

General admission and selection: Aggregated_Average_Required: 60%; aggregate_note: Excluding Life Orientation; requirements: ["Mathematics: 40% OR Mathematical Literacy: 60%"]; language_requirements: [{"learner_language_background": "Learners who were taught in English", "requirements": ["English Home Language: 60%", "Afrikaans OR isiXhosa, Home Language or First Additional Language: 50%"]}, {"learner_language_background": "Learners who were taught in Afrikaans", "requirements": ["Afrikaans Home Language: 60%", "English OR isiXhosa, Home Language or First Additional Language: 50%"]}, {"learner_language_background": "Learners who were taught in isiXhosa", "requirements": ["IsiXhosa Home Language: 60%", "English OR Afrikaans, Home Language or First Additional Language: 50%"]}].

Additional Stellenbosch requirements: Must meet the applicable language requirements based on language of teaching background; Further requirements depend on the school subjects the applicant wants to teach.

qualifications.name: Postgraduate Certificate in Education
notes: Aggregate note: Requires a prior degree rather than NSC aggregate average.
Abbreviation: PGCE.

Career opportunities: High school teacher in two subjects; High school teacher in one subject with additional study in that subject; Remedial teacher after further study; Educational Psychology pathway after further study.
Admission score type: Aggregated average.
Faculty aggregate note: Excluding Life Orientation.

General admission and selection: Aggregated_Average_Required: 60%; aggregate_note: Excluding Life Orientation; requirements: ["Mathematics: 40% OR Mathematical Literacy: 60%"]; language_requirements: [{"learner_language_background": "Learners who were taught in English", "requirements": ["English Home Language: 60%", "Afrikaans OR isiXhosa, Home Language or First Additional Language: 50%"]}, {"learner_language_background": "Learners who were taught in Afrikaans", "requirements": ["Afrikaans Home Language: 60%", "English OR isiXhosa, Home Language or First Additional Language: 50%"]}, {"learner_language_background": "Learners who were taught in isiXhosa", "requirements": ["IsiXhosa Home Language: 60%", "English OR Afrikaans, Home Language or First Additional Language: 50%"]}].

Additional Stellenbosch requirements: A degree from one of the other faculties with one or two school subjects; For PGCE teaching modules and their requirements, consult the Faculty of Education Calendar.
